title: Jackpot
description:
Deal 25 damage.
Add 3 random 0 Energy cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Deal 30 damage.
Add 3 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] 0 Energy cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Adds random 0-cost cards from the player's character pool to hand. If the card is upgraded, the added cards are also upgraded.
